benefits.description: Effective tanning with MTII; switched to MI for maintenance for more natural golden glow
Increased libido for herself (mild, already high baseline) and significant effect for her husband (morning wood, spontaneous erections)

side_effects.description: Initial 50 mcg dose caused nausea lasting about an hour; titrating up too fast caused nausea all day
Uneven/patchy tanning; darker moles; melanin production continues long after stopping; stopped MTII for almost 3 months to return to target tan before starting MI maintenance

protocol_notes: Started MTII at 50 mcg first dose; titrated up but went too hard causing full-day nausea. Recommends starting WAY lower than typical protocols. Sunscreen used due to accelerated melanin response (4 min sun = 20 min melanin response). Also mentions PT141 as an alternative for libido. Husband also used MTII and experienced patchy tanning that evened out after stopping.
